sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO wishlist (member_id, product_id, reg_date) VALUES (#memberId#, #productId#, #regDate#) SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
sqlMap.select: SELECT wishlist_id FROM wishlist WHERE member_id = #memberId# AND product_id = #productId#

SELECT w.wishlist_id, w.member_id, w.product_id, w.reg_date, p.name AS product_name, p.price, p.status, CONCAT(p.name, ' (', p.category, ')') AS display_label FROM wishlist w JOIN product p ON w.product_id = p.product_id WHERE w.member_id = #memberId# ORDER BY w.wishlist_id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wishlist WHERE member_id = #memberId#

SELECT w.wishlist_id, w.member_id, w.product_id, p.name AS PRODUCT_NAME, p.price, p.status, COALESCE(SUM(po.stock_qty),0) AS TOTAL_STOCK, CASE WHEN p.status='ON_SALE' AND COALESCE(SUM(po.stock_qty),0) > 0 THEN 'BUY_NOW' WHEN p.status='SOLD_OUT' OR COALESCE(SUM(po.stock_qty),0)=0 THEN 'OUT_OF_STOCK' WHEN p.status='DISCONTINUED' THEN 'GONE' ELSE 'WATCH' END AS STOCK_SIGNAL, CONCAT(p.name,' - ',p.status) AS DISPLAY_LABEL FROM wishlist w JOIN product p ON w.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN product_option po ON po.product_id = p.product_id WHERE w.member_id = #memberId# GROUP BY w.wishlist_id, w.member_id, w.product_id, p.name, p.price, p.status ORDER BY w.wishlist_id DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT w.product_id FROM wishlist w JOIN product p ON w.product_id = p.product_id JOIN product_option po ON po.product_id = p.product_id WHERE w.member_id = #memberId# AND p.status='ON_SALE' GROUP BY w.product_id HAVING SUM(po.stock_qty) > 0) t

SELECT w.wishlist_id, w.product_id, p.name AS PRODUCT_NAME FROM wishlist w JOIN product p ON w.product_id = p.product_id WHERE w.member_id = #memberId# AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM product_option po WHERE po.product_id = p.product_id AND po.stock_qty > 0) ORDER BY w.wishlist_id
